alerts.title: OpenAI, not yet public, raises $3B from retail investors in monster $122B fund raise
alerts.description: OpenAI's latest funding round, led by Amazon, Nvidia, and SoftBank, values the AI lab at $852 billion as it nears an IPO.

alerts.title: Nomadic raises $8.4 million to wrangle the data pouring off autonomous vehicles
alerts.description: The company turns footage from robots into structured, searchable datasets with a deep learning model.

alerts.title: South Korean AI Chipmaker Raises $400M for Inference
alerts.description: The evolving AI market presents opportunities for new players, such as Rebellions, to offer silicon diversity.

alerts.title: AI Legal Platform Startup Reaches $11B Valuation
alerts.description: The rapid growth of legal AI was underscored by a decline in legal data provider stocks after Anthropic's recent release of a legal plugin for its Cowork agent system.

alerts.title: Tencent to Double AI Spending to More Than $5B Over Next Year
alerts.description: The vendor is getting into the fast-growing AI personal agent market.

alerts.title: SpaceX confidentially files for IPO, setting stage for record offering
alerts.description: Elon Musk's SpaceX is reportedly targeting a valuation of around $1.75 trillion in its forthcoming IPO.
